journey.title: Delimitation
journey.desc: Constituencies are redrawn to ensure every vote has equal value. This is managed by the Delimitation Commission.
journey.details: The boundaries are adjusted based on population changes to maintain fair representation in the Lok Sabha.

journey.title: Electoral Rolls
journey.desc: The voter list is updated. Being a citizen of 18+ years is the primary eligibility.
journey.details: Voters must register via Form 6. The final list is published before polling.

journey.title: Scheduling
journey.desc: The Election Commission of India (ECI) announces the full timeline for polling phases.
journey.details: Includes dates for nominations, scrutiny, withdrawal, and final polling days.

journey.title: Nominations
journey.desc: Candidates file their papers through the Returning Officer (RO).
journey.details: Financial assets, education, and criminal records are declared via affidavits.

journey.title: Campaigning
journey.desc: Parties and candidates pitch their vision to voters under the Model Code of Conduct.
journey.details: Campaigning stops 48 hours before the close of polls to ensure a peaceful environment.

journey.title: Polling
journey.desc: Voters use Electronic Voting Machines (EVMs) with VVPAT for transparency.
journey.details: Polling occurs in multiple stages across the country to ensure security.

journey.title: Counting & Results
journey.desc: Votes are counted under strict supervision, and winners are declared.
journey.details: The VVPAT slips are also partially verified to confirm EVM accuracy.

readiness.title: Registration Status
readiness.desc: Is your name on the Electoral Roll?

readiness.title: Voter ID (EPIC Card)
readiness.desc: Do you have a physical or digital EPIC card?

readiness.title: Locate Polling Booth
readiness.desc: Know where to go on election day.

readiness.title: Valid Identity Proof
readiness.desc: Aadhaar, PAN, or Passport are valid alternatives.

faqs.question: How do I register for the first time?
faqs.answer: You can fill out Form 6 on the Voter Service Portal or use the Voter Helpline App.

faqs.question: What is VVPAT?
faqs.answer: Voter Verifiable Paper Audit Trail allows you to see a paper slip confirming your vote for 7 seconds.

faqs.question: Can I vote if I am an NRI?
faqs.answer: Yes, NRIs can register as 'Overseas Electors' but must be physically present at the booth to vote.
